plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Tomato Guard to use the camera for tomato leaf photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Tomato Guard to access your photos to pick a leaf image.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Tomato Guard to use your location for local weather and farming advice.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tomato Guard needs camera access to photograph tomato leaves for disease detection.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tomato Guard needs photo library access to select leaf images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tomato Guard uses your location to show weather-based disease risk and advice.
